untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'fundamental value deviation by 3 standard deviations', 'market resiliency indicator (bid-ask spread / volatility ratio)', and 'dealer participation signal' which are not available in the allowed indicator set. Bid-ask spread data and dealer flow indicators are not provided. Used proxy conditions (Bollinger Bands for price deviation, vol_ratio_20 for resiliency approximation) but these do not precisely capture the original microstructure logic.
translation_notes: CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction indicates counter-trend positioning. Entry uses bb_bandwidth (>75th percentile approximates high resiliency) and vol_ratio_20 (volume spike indicator). Position exits when bandwidth contracts below 50th percentile (resiliency decline) or price reverts toward sma_20. Fundamental value proxy approximated by sma_20. Time-based exit set to 20 trading periods as specified. Original signal's sophisticated dealer/value-trader inventory dynamics cannot be fully captured without order flow and microstructure data.
